data.title: Update architect-foundation SKILL.md with pre-fill call and per-stack reference table
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md to:
1. Add a step calling prefill-config.sh after detect-stack.sh runs, before the config inventory step
2. Add a per-stack reference table showing pre-filled keys and defaults for Python, Node/JS, Ruby, Rust

TDD exemption: Criterion 3 — static asset (LLM instruction file). Structural boundary test per Rule 5.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains reference to prefill-config.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'prefill-config' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains per-stack reference table
  Verify: grep -q 'Node.*npm\|Ruby.*rspec\|Python.*pytest' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md
